explanations.2: inline-flex makes this element sit inline with text but behave like a flex container, so you can arrange its children in a row.
explanations.4: vertical-align: middle doesn't actually work on flex containers, so this line does nothing here — it's likely leftover from before display: inline-flex was added.
explanations.6: var(--ifm-color-primary-dark) is a CSS variable (a reusable color value defined elsewhere) that pulls the dark version of the primary brand color.
